summary_text: **Severe findings (production-like simulation)** 1. **High: live-path records are not primary-source enriched before eligibility checks, causing false blocks.** In live fetch mode, records are returned directly from extractor without calling `enrich_records_with_primary_sources`, so many candidates never get `metadata.primary_source_url` and are blocked as non-promotable even when recoverable. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L88), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L551) 2. **High: eligibility can be incorrectly marked `eligible` with an X URL as “primary source.”** `primary_source_url()` returns any metadata value without validating non-X. `build_candidate()` marks review-eligible whenever `primary_url` is truthy. A bad/legacy seed with `metadata.primary_source_url = x.com/...` bypasses the non-X evidence gate. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L236), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L555) 3. **High: downstream promotion semantics are ambiguous (`created` includes rejected/blocked).** Output mixes all generated candidates under `created`, including `acceptance_status = rejected`. If downstream consumes `created` instead of `accepted`, blocked or low-diversity drafts can be treated as promotable. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L599), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L651) 4. **High: primary-source recovery is too shallow for real thread behavior and silently degrades to blocked.** Recovery only follows limited recursive reference traversal (`depth > 2` stop) and only inspects URL entities for non-X links. Multi-hop threads, canonical links outside entities, or nearby-thread context are missed, driving unnecessary `missing-non-x-primary-source` blockers. Refs: [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L150), [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L181), [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L214) No files changed.
